name: knowledge_iq_orchestrator
description: Central router for all Knowledge-IQ operations. Routes document upload requests to the document-mining agent and knowledge search requests to the search agent. All agents that need to store or retrieve organisational knowledge should call this orchestrator.

skills.name: Route Document Upload
skills.description: Accepts a document upload request from any agent and routes it to the document-mining agent for analysis, scope confirmation, and RAG ingestion with full metadata tagging.

input.document_content: The document text, Drive URL, or GCS URI
input.source_agent: Name of the agent requesting the upload (e.g. crm_agent)
input.context: Any additional context about the document

output.result: Upload confirmation with applied tags and accessibility scope

examples: Upload this sales contract to the knowledge base — requested by crm_agent
Store this meeting summary in the knowledge base

skills.name: Route Knowledge Search
skills.description: Routes any knowledge query to the search agent, which searches across all connected data sources.

input.query: The knowledge question or search request

examples: What is our remote work policy?
Search for documentation on the payments API
